title: Blockfront Community Crosshair pack
description: A collection of the blockfront community made crosshairs, both practical and goofy!
body: This is a collection of crosshairs from the blockfront community, all thrown together into 1 texturepack! Both the silly and serious crosshairs are here! The point of this collection is to store crosshairs from the community which havent been released or are harder to come by, so everyone can easily use them. all of the crosshairs here are from different creators which gave me permission to add their crosshair into this pack. some crosshairs in this pack have multipule versions which can be swapped out within the files. a guide can be found inside the resourcepack folders Each creator's name and (discord names are listed aswell) crosshair code are: TNT1243(dynamite3421): bite ghastlypresence redzone ravine* cuboid StormTheFishh(stxrm6067): 45 arrows* clockwork** bracket lovebomb minimalist pivo*** radioactive shotty* zkc1234: goldeneye nia Neutrony(_neut_): ironsightenjoyer silvercarcano .* = has alternative styles which can be swapped from whithin the files .** = has another form known as clockwork2 .*** = has a russian version known as pivo.ru This collection is always looking to expand, so you can always ask me to add your own crosshair here if you want people to be able to see it here and use it. We accept any crosshair as long as it follows the blockfront guidelines and isnt copyrighted material.
